# uptimekuma_notification_smsc (Resource)

SMSC SMS notification resource

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "uptimekuma_notification_smsc" "example" {
  name        = "SMSC SMS Notification"
  is_active   = true
  login       = "your_smsc_login"
  password    = "your_smsc_password"
  to_number   = "77123456789"
  sender_name = "Uptime"
  translit    = "0"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `login` (String, Sensitive) SMSC account login/username
- `name` (String) Notification name
- `password` (String, Sensitive) SMSC account password
- `to_number` (String) Recipient phone number

### Optional

- `apply_existing` (Boolean)
- `is_active` (Boolean)
- `is_default` (Boolean)
- `sender_name` (String) Sender name or identifier
- `translit` (String) Transliterate non-ASCII characters (0 = disabled, 1 = enabled)

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) Notification identifier
